description: Enable or disable death link support. If enabled:
Upon receiving a death, the player must get towed or navigate to the nearest service station.
Upon being towed to a service station or completing a delivery with over 5% cargo damage, the player
must send a death.
Goal condition:
All Delivery Tokens Collected: Collect a certain number of Delivery Tokens (see the "Delivery
Tokens" group of the options), then activate the win button to win.
All Secret Deliveries Completed: Collect instructions for secret deliveries (see the "Secret
Deliveries" group of the options, and the patch file from the multiworld host), then follow those
instructions to win.
Max Player Level Check Reached: Reach a certain level in career progression (see the
"player_level_checks" option), then activate the win button to win.
Which country should the player start in?
If that country doesn't exist because of disabled DLC, this option gets set to random. If the
selected country's checks are disabled, they are re-enabled.
Number of Delivery Tokens available in the multiworld item pool.
If the number of items exceeds the number of locations, this value may be reduced to accommodate. If
so, the delivery_tokens_required option will be reduced proportionally.
Number of Delivery Tokens needed to win. This value must not exceed delivery_tokens_available, and
this value will automatically be reduced to that value if applicable.
If the number of items exceeds the number of locations, delivery_tokens_available may be reduced to
accommodate. If so, this option will be reduced proportionally.
Number of total Secret Deliveries available.
If the number of items exceeds the number of locations, this option may be reduced to accommodate.
If so, secret_deliveries_required will be reduced proportionally. secret_delivery_instruction_parts
will not be reduced.
Number of Secret Deliveries that must be completed to goal. Must not exceed
secret_deliveries_available, and this value will automatically be reduced to that value if
applicable.
If the number of items exceeds the number of locations, secret_deliveries_available may be reduced
to accommodate. If so, this option will be reduced proportionally. secret_delivery_instruction_parts
will not be reduced.
Number of separate parts to the instructions of each Secret Delivery.
Not all parts must be found in order to perform a Secret Delivery; once the instructions are
decipherable, the delivery may be performed.
This option will not be affected by location truncation.

enable_state_united_kingdom.display_name: Enable the Country of United Kingdom
description: Whether or not the Country of United Kingdom, and all checks within its bounds, as well as its
starter key, should be enabled for this AP.
Regardless of the value below, the United Kingdom Key will still spawn, and be required before
traveling within this country.
Whether or not cities should be checks. If so, the check is performed by driving into the city; the
check may be cleared when the "(City Name) Discovered" popup appears.
Whether or not companies should be checks. If so, the player may choose one of the following:
- A check is performed when driving onto any of that company's depots. (The check may be cleared
when the map tile turns yellow.)
- A check is performed when performing a delivery to that company. (The check may be cleared when
the results screen appears.)
- A check is performed when performing a delivery to or for that company. (The checm kay be cleared
when the results screen appears.)
Whether or not photo trophies should be checks. If so, the check is performed when you take the
photo with the name of the monument on the screen.
The Camera item is required before you can take photos, but you can choose to start with it in your
inventory.
Whether or not viewpoints should be checks. If so, the check is performed when you finish watching
the viewpoint cutscene and control is returned to the player.
The TV item is required before you can watch viewpoints, but you can choose to start with it in your
inventory.
How many player levels should be checks? All levels from 1 to the specified number will be included.
The check is performed when the level shown on the left side of the bar is at least the level being
checked.
If this is set to 0, no level checks apply.
If the goal is set to Max Player Level Check Reached, this option must have a value of at least 1.
How should player skills be handled?
disabled: Do not scatter skill options. When you level up, you have free rein to choose where you
put your skill points.
spread: Scatter skill options throughout the multiworld item pool. You may not use skill points upon
leveling up unless you have the relevant skill option item.
condensed: Randomize skill options within level-up checks. For each level-up check, a random skill
item will be granted, which must be applied immediately. Once you exceed the last level-up check,
you have free choice on how to spend your remaining skill points. If player_level_checks is 0, this
has no effect.
A Bank Loan Approval is required before you can take any loans from the bank. Should it be part of
the multiworld item pool, requiring you to find it, or should it be part of your starting inventory
and always be available?
If it is part of the multiworld item pool, it will be considered an "early" item.
Truck Contracts are required before you can buy any trucks from truck dealers. Should they be part
of the multiworld item pool, requiring you to find them, or should they be part of your starting
inventory and always be available?
The options have the following meaning:
- all_in_starting_inventory: All truck contracts are in the starting inventory, and do not need to
be found in the multiworld.
- all_in_item_pool_early: All truck contracts are in sphere 1.
- all_in_item_pool: All truck contracts can be anywhere in the multiworld.
- random_in_starting_inventory: A randomly selected truck contract is in the starting inventory.
The rest can be anywhere in the multiworld.
- random_in_item_pool_early: A randomly selected truck contract is in sphere 1. The rest can be
anywhere in the multiworld.
- (brand)_in_starting_inventory: The specified brand's truck contract is in the starting inventory.
The rest can be anywhere in the multiworld.
- (brand)_in_item_pool_early: The specified brand's truck contract is in sphere 1. The rest can be
anywhere in the multiworld.
A Trailer Contract is required before you can purchase any trailers. Should it be part of the
multiworld item pool, requiring you to find it, or should it be part of your starting inventory and
always be available?
A Quick Travel Ticket is required before you can quick travel to an undiscovered city (whether
through its DLC opening or through Convoy). Should it be part of the multiworld item pool, requiring
you to find it, or should it be part of your starting inventory and always be available?
It can be disabled outright, such that quick traveling is never in logic, so long as all the enabled
DLCs are connected to each other (otherwise, this will be set to in_starting_inventory).
What percent of countries should contain locations? Note that other countries will still have Keys,
and you must obtain those Keys before driving in those countries.
The options in this category are applied in the following order: checks_country_chance_percent,
checks_country_count_max, checks_chance_percent, checks_within_country_max, checks_max_count.
How many countries should contain locations? Note that other accessible countries will still have
Keys , and you must obtain those Keys before driving in those countries.
Setting this higher than the number of countries that exist has no effect besides future-proofing
your yaml. The default value is the number of countries that exist so far.
What should the chance be of each location appearing in the AP?
What is the maximum number of checks that should appear in each country? Companies are considered
countryless and are not affected by this option.
Setting this higher than the number of checks per country that exist has no effect besides
future-proofing your yaml. The default value is the highest max number per country.
What is the maximum number of checks that should be present in the multiworld?
Setting this higher than the number of checks that exists has no effect besides future-proofing your
yaml. The default value is the highest existing number so far.
